_comment: Curated region overrides for companies whose exchange geography is misleading (e.g., OTCQX ADRs of non-US firms) or whose primary listing differs from the one in 02_universe.csv. Keys are ticker or name; values may include region, parent (for deduplicating multi-listings), and reason.

changelog.reason: Initial override set for Phase 2 universe-weighted HHI.

SHECY.reason: OTCQX ADR; primary TSE listing is Shin-Etsu Chemical (Japan).

4063.TSE.reason: Primary TSE listing for Shin-Etsu Chemical.

IFNNY.reason: OTCQX ADR; underlying Infineon Technologies AG is Europe.

ASMV.reason: OTCQX ADR; underlying ASMPT (HK:0522) is GreaterChina.
